Local analysis · GitHub #27

Black Ops 7: player K/D and respawn map wins

Every recorded Black Ops 7 Major/Premier respawn player-map through 2026-07-19 with kills, deaths, and a validated team result. Challengers events are excluded. This is same-map association—not proof that a player's K/D independently caused the result or predicts future maps.

Major events
5
Non-Challengers Major/Premier events
Respawn maps
261
157 Hardpoint + 104 Overload
Players
77
Every recorded player included
Player-map rows
2088
All eight rows present per valid map

What the three denominators mean

P(win | positive)
74.0%
Team win rate on positive player-maps
P(win | even)
55.8%
Team win rate on exactly-even player-maps
P(win | negative)
27.2%
Team win rate on negative player-maps
All-player map-level correlations: K/D +0.49; kills +0.28; deaths -0.34. Player rows from the same map are not independent, so use these as descriptive orientation.

All-player summary

Every recorded player remains in the report; map count and stability context sit beside each estimate. Click any header to sort.

Positive, even, and negative maps

“Positive uplift” is P(win | positive) minus P(win | non-positive). Exactly 1.00 K/D is kept in the even bucket.

Positive-in-loss and negative-in-win results

These are descriptive exceptions, not player-value rankings. Rates retain their own denominators: positive maps among losses and negative maps among wins.

Strongest and weakest continuous K/D–win relationships

Point-biserial Pearson correlation of map K/D with the binary team result, computed within each player. The approximate 95% interval is shown for context; unavailable and unstable estimates stay visible. Kills and deaths are shown separately to decompose the direction.

Win rate by map K/D band

Each row is a player-band combination. Exact 1.00 K/D has its own band; no-death maps, if any, are not folded into a finite ratio band.

Player map drilldown
